darpan.reconciliation.HcReadDbConfig.description: Seed reader profile for inventory reconciliation examples.

darpan.rule.RuleSet.description: Resolves read-db SQL template for inventory reconciliation test flow.

darpan.rule.Rule.ruleText: Join template when useInventoryItemJoin is true
darpan.rule.Rule.ruleLogic: rule "Select Join SQL Template" salience 200 when $m : Map( this["sqlStatementTemplate"] == null, this["useInventoryItemJoin"] == true ) then $m.put("sqlTemplateName", "TEST_JOIN_TEMPLATE"); $m.put("sqlStatementTemplate", "SELECT d.* FROM ${DETAIL_TABLE} d JOIN ${ITEM_TABLE} i ON d.${ITEM_COLUMN} = i.${ITEM_COLUMN} WHERE i.${ITEM_COLUMN} = ? AND d.${LOCATION_COLUMN} = ? AND d.${DATE_COLUMN} >= ? AND d.${DATE_COLUMN} < ?"); end

darpan.rule.Rule.ruleText: Detail-only template when useInventoryItemJoin is false
darpan.rule.Rule.ruleLogic: rule "Select Detail SQL Template" salience 100 when $m : Map( this["sqlStatementTemplate"] == null ) then $m.put("sqlTemplateName", "TEST_DETAIL_TEMPLATE"); $m.put("sqlStatementTemplate", "SELECT * FROM ${DETAIL_TABLE} WHERE ${ITEM_COLUMN} = ? AND ${LOCATION_COLUMN} = ? AND ${DATE_COLUMN} >= ? AND ${DATE_COLUMN} < ?"); end

darpan.rule.RuleSet.description: Classifies inventory reconciliation comparison status for testing.

darpan.rule.Rule.ruleLogic: rule "Mark Error" salience 1000 when $m : Map( this["compareStatus"] == null, (this["nsStatus"] == "ERROR" || this["readDbStatus"] == "ERROR") ) then $m.put("compareStatus", "ERROR"); end

darpan.rule.Rule.ruleText: Mark no records in both sources
darpan.rule.Rule.ruleLogic: rule "Mark No Records" salience 900 when $m : Map( this["compareStatus"] == null, this["nsRecordCount"] == 0, this["readDbRecordCount"] == 0 ) then $m.put("compareStatus", "NO_RECORDS"); end
rule "Mark Missing In NS" salience 800 when $m : Map( this["compareStatus"] == null, this["nsRecordCount"] == 0, this["readDbRecordCount"] > 0 ) then $m.put("compareStatus", "MISSING_IN_NS"); end

darpan.rule.Rule.ruleText: Mark missing records in read DB
darpan.rule.Rule.ruleLogic: rule "Mark Missing In Read DB" salience 700 when $m : Map( this["compareStatus"] == null, this["nsRecordCount"] > 0, this["readDbRecordCount"] == 0 ) then $m.put("compareStatus", "MISSING_IN_READ_DB"); end
rule "Mark Count Mismatch" salience 600 when $m : Map( this["compareStatus"] == null, this["nsRecordCount"] != this["readDbRecordCount"] ) then $m.put("compareStatus", "COUNT_MISMATCH"); end
rule "Mark Matched Count" salience 100 when $m : Map( this["compareStatus"] == null ) then $m.put("compareStatus", "MATCHED_COUNT"); end
